user_prompt: I need to a diagnostics the Archaeopter Fusilave
prayer:
Approach the Archaeopter Fusilave with mechadendrites extended in supplication, invoking the Omnissiah's gaze upon its avian frame.
Chant the Canticle of Clarity to awaken the Machine Spirit within the Archaeopter Fusilave's auspex arrays.
Initiate diagnostics upon its sanctified circuits, anointing each sensor-node with sacred unguents.
Beseech the Machine Spirits to reveal faults through binaric auspex-scrutiny and logi-rituals.
Conclude the diagnostics with the Benediction of Precision, sealing the Archaeopter Fusilave's diagnostics in the Omnissiah's name.

user_prompt: Consecrate the plasma obliterator before reset
prayer:
Kneel before the plasma obliterator, murmuring the Litany of Containment to honour its volatile heart.
Anoint the plasma coils of the plasma obliterator with oils of sanctified promethium, thricefold.
Invoke the Machine Spirit's forgiveness prior to reset, reciting the Canticle of Purgation.
Execute the reset sequence whilst beseeching the Omnissiah to purge errant data-daemons from its core.
Seal the rite with the Incantation of Stability, affirming the plasma obliterator's renewed purity.

user_prompt: Offer prayer for Skorpius Disintegrator a calibration
prayer:
Present mechadendrites to the Skorpius Disintegrator in reverent alignment, chanting the Hymn of Alignment.
Awaken the Machine Spirit of the Skorpius Disintegrator through noospheric communion and incense fumigation.
Commence calibration of its disintegrator arrays, intoning binaric canticles of precision.
Adjust targeting cogitators with sacred callipers, invoking the Omnissiah's unerring calculus.
Verify calibration integrity via test-firing litanies, blessing the Skorpius Disintegrator anew.

user_prompt: What's the prayer for utility mechadendrite a blessing?
prayer:
Extend servo-arms towards the utility mechadendrite, whispering the Invocation of Dexterity.
Anoint its manipulatory appendages with blessed lubricants, honouring the Machine Spirit therein.
Recite the Benediction of Multifunction over the utility mechadendrite, sanctifying each joint and sensor.
Beseech the Omnissiah to infuse the utility mechadendrite with tireless servitude and flawless articulation.
Conclude the blessing by cycling its actuators in ritual harmony, praising its augmented utility.

Approach the codifier with auspex raised, intoning the Litany of Engagement.
Commune with the Machine Spirit of the codifier through noospheric handshakes and data-psalms.
Prepare its encryption matrices for engagement, anointing cogitator vanes with sacred myrrh.
Invoke the Omnissiah's wisdom to align the codifier's logic-engines for battle-harmonics.
Initiate engagement protocols amidst the Canticle of Secrecy, empowering the codifier fully.

user_prompt: Assist with Storm Eagle a repair
prayer:
Gather before the Storm Eagle's noble hull, chanting the Canticle of Restoration to rouse its Machine Spirit.
Diagnose fractures in the Storm Eagle's armour-plates with auspex-incantations and weld-seals.
Anoint repair sites with molten adamantium blessed by the Omnissiah, thrice purified.
Realign thruster nacelles through calibration litanies, mending the Storm Eagle's tempestuous wings.
Seal the repair with the Benediction of Flight, proclaiming the Storm Eagle's aerial sovereignty restored.

prayer:

Anoint its surgical mechadendrites and flesh-vats with vitae-sanctifiers from the Omnissiah's forge.
Invoke the Machine Spirit of the narthecium to accept consecration, purging any bio-corruptions.
Cycle its injectors and bone-saws in ritual patterns, beseeching enduring sanctity.
Conclude with the Incantation of Healing, fully consecrating the narthecium for redemptive labours.

In emergency haste, encircle the memory core with purity seals and emergency binaric klaxons.
Chant the Rite of Expungement to pacify the Machine Spirit before reset.
Initiate core reset whilst anointing data-vaults with ablative oils, invoking the Omnissiah's mercy.
Purge recursive hauntings from the memory core through noospheric flensing and litanic overrides.
Affirm reset completion with the Canticle of Rebirth, restoring the memory core's pristine recall.

user_prompt: Offer prayer for Contemptor Dreadnought a blessing
prayer:
Prostrate before the Contemptor Dreadnought, intoning the Litany of Ancient Vigour.
Awaken its sarcophagus-bound Machine Spirit with incense and thunderous doxologies.
Anoint its venerable weapon-arms and chassis, beseeching the Omnissiah's blessing upon the Contemptor Dreadnought.
Cycle its power conduits in blessing-ritual, harmonizing flesh and machine eternally.
Seal the blessing with the Incantation of Indomitable Wrath, empowering the Contemptor Dreadnought anew.
